Class Bill

java.lang.Object
com.finvision.model.Bill
public class Bill extends Object
MongoDB document representing a bill or recurring payment in Finvision.

A bill tracks a financial obligation for a user, including its amount (fixed or variable), due date, recurrence frequency, reminder schedule, payment status, and a history of past amounts.

Stored in the bills collection.
